de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.label

Interface RuleSpecificTask

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    ChildTermLabelPolicy, TermLabelRefactoring, TermLabelUpdate
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    BlockContractValidityTermLabelUpdate, FormulaTermLabelRefactoring, FormulaTermLabelUpdate, LoopBodyTermLabelUpdate, LoopInvariantNormalBehaviorTermLabelUpdate, RemoveInCheckBranchesTermLabelRefactoring, SymbolicExecutionTermLabelUpdate

    public interface RuleSpecificTask
    Instances of this class provides functionality only if a supported rule is active.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
    See Also:
    ChildTermLabelPolicy, TermLabelUpdate, TermLabelRefactoring

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ImmutableList<Name> getSupportedRuleNames()
      Returns the supported rule Names or null or an empty list if all rules are supported.

    • Method Detail

      • getSupportedRuleNames

        ImmutableList<Name> getSupportedRuleNames()
        Returns the supported rule Names or null or an empty list if all rules are supported.
        Returns:
        The list of supported rule Names or null/empty list if all rules are supported.
